channel.title: c0balt - dev logs
channel.description: The cognitive core of a custom AR-based Operating System

item.title: Log 0x00: The Genesis
item.description:
# [ COBALT Engineering Log 0x00 ] ## The Genesis
*3:00 AM. Staring at my Arch config. My "smart" workspace feels like a dumb brick. Everything is a wrapper of a wrapper. I want the actual metal benea...

item.title: Log 0x01: Nexus — The First Spark
item.description:

item.title: Log 0x04: PyProbe — Memory Introspection From Scratch

item.title: Log 0x05: PyProbe — Cleaning Up the Chaos

item.title: Log 0x06: PyJX — The Python-Java Bridge
item.description:

item.title: Log 0x9: The Great GitHub Actions Debacle
